title: hymenolobus perpusillus
intro: Hymenolobus perpusillus, also known as the annual self-heal or annual prairie clover, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family. The medicinal properties of Hymenolobus perpusillus lie in its high content of flavonoids, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, as well as its ability to act as an antimicrobial agent. Hymenolobus perpusillus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide various health benefits.
